message:
Refactor watch command to use Output trait for consistent messaging

Convert cmd_watch to use the Output trait pattern:
- Accept output: &dyn Output parameter for consistent message handling
- Replace println!/eprintln! with output.info()/output.warning()
- Add watch_buttons_with_output helper for trait-based event output
- Remove emit_watch_event in favor of direct Output calls

This aligns the watch command with the rest of the CLI's output
abstraction, enabling proper JSON mode and quiet mode support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
